% Lablog fixture: caracteres, griego, operadores y relaciones (KaTeX + amsmath)
% Uso: snippet de página lablog (sin \documentclass) o body de documento completo.

\section*{Alfabeto griego}
\[
\alpha\,\beta\,\gamma\,\delta\,\epsilon\,\varepsilon\,\zeta\,\eta\,\theta\,\vartheta,
\iota\,\kappa\,\lambda\,\mu\,\nu\,\xi\,\pi\,\varpi\,\rho\,\varrho,
\sigma\,\varsigma\,\tau\,\upsilon\,\phi\,\varphi\,\chi\,\psi\,\omega
\]
\[
\Gamma\,\Delta\,\Theta\,\Lambda\,\Xi\,\Pi\,\Sigma\,\Upsilon\,\Phi\,\Psi\,\Omega
\]

\section*{Operadores y cálculo}
\[
\sum_{n=1}^{\infty} \frac{1}{n^2}
= \frac{\pi^2}{6},
\quad
\int_{-\infty}^{\infty} e^{-x^2}\,\mathrm{d}x = \sqrt{\pi},
\quad
\partial_\mu A^\mu + \nabla\cdot\mathbf{B}
\]
\[
\prod_i \lambda_i,\quad
\bigoplus_k H_k,\quad
\bigotimes_{j=1}^{N} V_j,\quad
\hbar,\quad \nabla^2,\quad \Box
\]

\section*{Relaciones y conjuntos}
\[
a \leq b \approx c \equiv d \neq e \propto f \sim g \simeq h
\]
\[
x \in \mathbb{R} \subset \mathbb{C},\quad
A \subseteq B,\quad
\emptyset \neq \varnothing,\quad
\forall \epsilon > 0\ \exists \delta > 0
\]

\section*{Flechas y acentos}
\[
f\colon X \to Y,\quad
A \Rightarrow B \Leftrightarrow C,\quad
x \mapsto x^2
\]
\[
\vec{v},\ \hat{n},\ \bar{z},\ \tilde{q},\ \dot{x},\ \ddot{x},\ \mathbf{E},\ \mathcal{L}
\]

\section*{Funciones y delimitadores}
\[
\sin\theta,\ \cos\phi,\ \tan\alpha,\ \ln x,\ \exp(-i\omega t),\ \det M,\ \mathrm{tr}\,\rho
\]
\[
\left\langle \psi \middle| \hat{H} \middle| \psi \right\rangle,\quad
\left\lVert \mathbf{v} \right\rVert,\quad
\left\lfloor x \right\rfloor,\ \left\lceil y \right\rceil
\]
